_description: Generate character with neutral expression for identity lock. Stage 1 of pipeline. CLEAN REFERENCE ONLY — no scene, no reaction, no product, no props, no hands. Just the person's face and shoulders.
_usage: Fill [FILL] fields from brand audience persona and character spec. Generate 3-4 variations. Pick the best face. That becomes the locked reference for all future shots.
_lessons: V5.0 → V5.1: Phone was appearing in frame because prompt mentioned 'looking at phone camera'. Removed all phone references from expression/gaze. Added phone/hands to negative prompt
V5.0 → V5.1: Added market context field — character should read as part of the brand's target market (e.g. American woman, not just ethnicity)
V5.0 → V5.1: Simplified framing to centered head+shoulders. The off-center tilt is for SCENE shots, not avatar lock. Lock shots need clean, repeatable reference
V5.0 → V5.1: Added explicit 'this is a AVATAR REFERENCE' note to environment to prevent models from building elaborate scenes
INSIGHT: Detailed signature details (grey streak, chin scar, asymmetric brows) produce consistent characters even across separate generations WITHOUT a reference image. The verbal fingerprint works
reference_images: NONE — this template is for generating a NEW character. No reference images attached

subject.demographics: [FILL: age, skin tone, heritage. IMPORTANT: include market context — e.g. 'American woman, South Asian-American heritage' not just 'South Asian'. The character should read as part of the brand's target market]

signature_details.primary: [FILL: THE lock detail. Face anchor tier. Must be visible in every frame at any angle. Best: unique hair feature, prominent mark, distinctive scar. This is how you verify identity across generations]
signature_details.secondary: [FILL: Second identifier. Can be face or style anchor. Best: facial scar, birthmark, unique feature. Should be visible in close-ups]
signature_details.tertiary: [FILL: Third subtle detail. Asymmetry or micro-feature. Best: eyebrow asymmetry, tooth gap, ear detail. Adds realism and catches model drift]

subject.hair: [FILL: type, color, length, texture, current state. Be VERY specific — this is a major identity anchor. Include day-of-hair state (freshly washed vs day-two vs messy)]
subject.skin_details: [FILL: REAL skin. Pores, blemishes, under-eye details, lip condition, texture. Reinforce signature details here. Specify the TYPE of under-eye circles (purple/blue for fair skin, brown hyperpigmentation for darker skin). Include at least one imperfection that isn't a signature detail]
subject.apparel: [FILL: simple home clothes. Include wear details (fading, pilling, stains). Nothing that competes with face. Keep neutral colors so face is the focus]
subject.accessories: [FILL: minimal but specific. These become consistency markers across scenes. Max 3 items. Include exact details (size, material, which side)]

expression.type: NEUTRAL for avatar lock. Natural resting face. Not reacting, not posing, not smiling. Just her face at rest — the expression she'd have staring at nothing in particular
expression.micro_expression: [FILL: describe how signature details affect resting expression — e.g. 'asymmetric brows give subtle skeptical quality at rest']
expression.gaze: Looking 2-3 degrees right of lens. Calm, slightly unfocused gaze. NOT looking at a phone. NOT looking at anything specific. Just a neutral soft gaze slightly off-axis

camera.DOF: DEEP. Everything in sharp focus. NO blur. NO portrait mode
camera.framing: Head and shoulders ONLY. Centered. Clean and simple. NO hands in frame. NO phone visible. NO props. NO objects being held. Just face, neck, and upper shoulders against a simple background. This is a AVATAR REFERENCE image — keep it clean

lighting.source: Soft natural window light from the left. Warm, diffused. Subtle shadow on right side of face
lighting.quality: Flattering but natural. Not studio, not harsh

environment.setting: Simple neutral background. Plain wall or minimal home interior. Background is NOT important — this is a AVATAR REFERENCE shot. All attention on her face. Keep it clean and undistracting
environment.note: THIS IS A AVATAR LOCK IMAGE. No elaborate scene. No context. No story. Just the person. Scene-specific settings come in Stage 2 (scene-expression template)
